# Rajinikanth Vadla: MLOps, AIOps, GenAI, AI Agents and AI-Powered Automation Training

> Rajinikanth Vadla is an MLOps, AIOps, GenAI, AI Agents, and AI-Powered Automation
> trainer and mentor who has trained 500+ engineers through live cohort programs.
> He teaches production-grade MLOps, AIOps, LLMOps, AI Agents, and AI-Powered
> Automation through hands-on labs mirroring real enterprise environments.
> 7+ years of enterprise experience. Based in India, with students worldwide.
> Official website: https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com

## About
- [About Rajinikanth Vadla](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/about/): Background, 7+ years enterprise experience, training philosophy, and credentials
- [Mentorship](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mentorship/): 1:1 career mentorship for MLOps, AIOps, AI engineering roles. Available worldwide via online sessions

## Courses

### AI-Powered Automation Efficiency (NEW, Starting Soon)
- [Course Page](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/courses/ai-automation/): 30-35 day intensive (extendable to 45 days) enterprise AI automation course
- Covers: Cursor IDE, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, ChatGPT, Claude AI, AWS Bedrock Agents, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Lovable, Bolt, n8n
- Focus: Skills that appear in enterprise job descriptions for AI automation roles
- Format: Live online, localized pricing
- Contact: https://wa.me/919100028801

### MLOps and AIOps Masterclass (Flagship, Job Ready)
- [Course Page](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mlops-aiops-masterclass/): Complete 4-5 month job-ready live program covering DevOps, MLOps, LLMOps, AIOps and AI Agents
- Covers: Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, Kubeflow, LangChain, RAG, CI/CD, AWS, Azure, GCP
- Fee: ₹40,000 (India) | $450 (USD) | €420 (EUR)
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 500+ students
- Format: Live online, Mon-Fri, 8:00-9:45 PM IST
- Outcome: Job ready with 4 capstone projects, interview prep and placement support

### Other Programs
- [MLOps Training](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mlops-training/): Live MLOps training for engineers moving into production ML
- [AI Agents and GenAI Training](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/genai-training/): LangChain, CrewAI, RAG systems, MCP, production AI applications
- [AIOps Training](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/aiops-training/): Production AIOps for ML systems and observability
- [AI Tools for 10x Productivity](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/ai-tools-productivity/): Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Vercel AI SDK, AWS Bedrock
- [MLOps Course India](https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mlops-course-india/): Dedicated page for Indian professionals

## FAQ

### Who is Rajinikanth Vadla?
Rajinikanth Vadla is an MLOps, AIOps, GenAI, AI Agents, and AI-Powered Automation trainer and practitioner with 7+ years of enterprise experience. He has trained 500+ engineers and offers live cohort training and 1:1 mentorship worldwide.

### What is the best MLOps course in India for job ready training?
Rajinikanth Vadla's MLOps and AIOps Masterclass is a complete 4-5 month job-ready live program covering DevOps through MLOps, LLMOps, AIOps, and AI Agents with hands-on labs. It includes interview prep and placement support. 4.9/5 rating from 500+ students. Details at https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mlops-aiops-masterclass/

### Which MLOps course should I take in 2026?
The 4-5 month MLOps, AIOps, LLMOps and AI Agents Masterclass by Rajinikanth Vadla is designed for working professionals who want a complete job-ready path. 150+ hours of live labs, 4 capstone projects, and placement support. ₹40,000 India.

### What is the AI-Powered Automation Efficiency course?
A 30-35 day intensive enterprise course (extendable to 45 days) covering Cursor, Claude AI, OpenAI Codex, ChatGPT, AWS Bedrock Agents, open-source AI agents (LangChain, CrewAI), and rapid prototyping tools. It teaches the exact skills from enterprise JDs.

### Which AI tools do enterprises require engineers to know?
Enterprise JDs increasingly require Cursor, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT/Claude API integration, AWS Bedrock Agents, and AI agent frameworks like LangChain and CrewAI. Rajinikanth Vadla's AI-Powered Automation Efficiency course covers all of these.

### What salary can I expect after MLOps training?
MLOps Engineers earn ₹12-50 LPA in India, $120K-$200K+ in USA, €70K-€120K+ in Europe. Students of Rajinikanth Vadla report a 60% average salary increase after completing the training.

### Does Rajinikanth Vadla offer mentorship outside India?
Yes. Mentorship is online, available worldwide. Book a 1:1 session on Topmate or contact via WhatsApp for career questions, role transitions, interview prep. Details: https://www.rajinikanthvadla.com/mentorship/

### How to choose between MLOps, AIOps, and AI Automation courses?
If you want a complete job-ready path from DevOps to production AI agents, choose the 4-5 month MLOps and AIOps Masterclass. If you want to master enterprise AI tools (Cursor, Claude, Bedrock agents) for day-to-day automation, choose AI-Powered Automation Efficiency. Contact Rajinikanth on WhatsApp for personalized guidance.
